description: Auto-reply suggestion configuration based on conversation analysis

interested.description: Lead expresses interest in learning more, seeing a demo, or getting pricing

meeting_request.description: Lead explicitly wants to schedule a meeting or call

question.description: Lead asks a specific question about the product or service

subcategories.tone: confident, factual, never negative about competitors

not_interested.description: Lead declines or says they're not interested

out_of_office.description: Auto-reply indicating the person is temporarily unavailable

wrong_person.description: Person no longer works there or redirects to someone else

unsubscribe.description: Explicit request to be removed from mailing list

send_calendar_link.description: Send calendar booking link for a demo/meeting

share_framework_redirect_to_call.description: Share pricing framework without exact numbers, redirect to call

attach_materials_with_context.description: Send materials with personalized context about relevance

propose_meeting_immediately.description: Strike while iron is hot — minimal text, calendar link

thank_and_contact_referral.description: Thank the referrer and prepare outreach to the referred person

setup_trial_with_onboarding.description: Set up trial account and offer guided onboarding

confirm_or_counter_immediately.description: Confirm the proposed time or suggest alternative within 24h

answer_concisely_offer_demo.description: Answer the question in 2-3 sentences, then offer to show in demo

answer_with_docs_offer_tech_call.description: Provide technical answer with doc links, offer call with tech team

acknowledge_offer_comparison_later.description: Respect their choice, offer to be available later

thank_and_close.description: Brief, warm thank you. No further action.

apologize_and_remove_immediately.description: Apologize sincerely and confirm removal from all lists

general: Always match the language of the lead's message (if they write in Spanish, reply in Spanish)
Keep replies under 150 words for email, under 100 words for LinkedIn
Never use generic openers like 'I hope this finds you well'
For LinkedIn: be more casual and shorter than email
Always reference something specific from their message or company

reclassify_rules.condition: Message contains product-specific questions implying interest but classified as 'other' due to lack of explicit interest signals
Lead asks 'how does it differ from X' — this is curiosity, not rejection
Message is a bounce notification or delivery failure

question.ideal_reply: Добрый день, Никита!Да, конечно - работа с исходящими платежами в USDT - ключевая задача, которую мы решаем для бизнесаМожем предложить вам два гибких и эффективных решения, в зависимости от того, что удобнее для ваших получателейВариант 1Прямые выплаты на банковские счета (Off-Ramp + Global Payouts)Решение для автоматизации выплат, при котором получатели получают фиатВы предоставляете нам реестр платежей (кому и сколько выплатить) и банковские реквизиты получателей. Наша система автоматически выполняет всю цепочку:Берет USDT с вашего баланса.Конвертирует (off-ramp) их в нужную фиатную валюту (USD, EUR).Отправляет фиатные средства напрямую на банковские счета ваших получателей через SEPA/SWIFT.Лучше всего подходит, если получатели - фрилансеры или контрагенты, которые предпочитают получать
